settings.title: Billet Selection
settings.copy: Aerospace-grade 6061-T6 aluminium billet is chosen for consistency before the first press cycle begins.

settings.title: Forging Pressure
settings.copy: The billet is compressed under extreme force to align grain structure and create a stronger base form.

settings.title: CNC Machining
settings.copy: Spoke surfaces, pad height, hub bore, and final mass are machined to the vehicle-specific specification.

settings.title: Inspection
settings.copy: Every wheel is inspected for finish, balance, and dimensional accuracy before it is approved to leave.

settings.headline: Cold Forged
settings.quote: The finest objects are not decorated. They are compressed into their final form.
